text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Satsuki Sho, the first race of
the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Mejiro Ardan has set the Japanese
Derby as her goal, she's always held a strong
desire to leave a mark on the Triple Crown tour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And since the Satsuki Sho is the first race of the
tour, we can't possibly pass up this opportunity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Knowing her body's current state, I'm confident
she'll be able to put up a good fight at the
Satsuki Sho, and then take on the Japanese
Derby!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Even in the waiting room, I can feel the tension
in the air. So this is what it's like to attend a
Classic G1 race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I'll be quite fine. I'm prepared both mentally
and physically.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
As the first step to outshining my older sister, I
wish to prove myself at the Satsuki Sho today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Please watch me as I run.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The Satsuki Sho—the first race of the Classic
Triple Crown—will be starting shortly!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (So this is the Satsuki Sho.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(The feverish cheering, the sheer passion of the
racers, this crushingly heavy atmosphere...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(And yet, amidst it all, I can still feel the beating
of my heart—a pulse that this world shall never
drown out.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...My older sister must have stood atop such
stages too.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wow... Ardan's focus is amazing.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But don't forget about me! I'm going to deliver a
standout performance today, and then proceed
right on to the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Both Chiyono O and Ardan seem to be in top
form.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ardan, in particular... From up close, that
concentration of hers is truly staggering.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: A worthy opponent indeed!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Though it does somewhat vex me that she's
paying me no mind.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...I'll show you, Ardan. I'll show you a performance
you can't ignore!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
To best the crown jewel of the Mejiro family, and
outdo her brilliance...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I shall run with all I have.
